NT-1.title: Earthquake
NT-1.description: Seismic activity causing structural damage to facilities and infrastructure

NT-2.title: Flood
NT-2.description: Water damage from flooding events affecting facilities or equipment

NT-3.title: Fire
NT-3.description: Fire damage to facilities, equipment, or data storage

NT-4.title: Severe Weather
NT-4.description: Hurricanes, tornadoes, severe storms affecting operations

NT-5.title: Power Outage
NT-5.description: Loss of electrical power affecting systems availability

NT-7.title: Environmental Hazard
NT-7.description: Chemical spills, pollution, or other environmental contamination

MT-1.title: Malware
MT-1.description: Malicious software including viruses, trojans, and worms

MT-2.title: Ransomware
MT-2.description: Malware that encrypts data and demands payment for decryption

MT-3.title: Phishing
MT-3.description: Social engineering attacks to obtain credentials or sensitive information

MT-4.title: DDoS Attack
MT-4.description: Distributed denial of service attacks against systems or networks

MT-5.title: Insider Threat
MT-5.description: Malicious actions by trusted insiders with legitimate access

MT-6.title: Advanced Persistent Threat
MT-6.description: Sophisticated, prolonged attacks by well-resourced adversaries

MT-7.title: Data Exfiltration
MT-7.description: Unauthorized extraction of sensitive data from systems

MT-8.title: Credential Theft
MT-8.description: Stealing authentication credentials through various means

MT-10.title: SQL Injection
MT-10.description: Exploiting database vulnerabilities through malicious queries

MT-12.title: Social Engineering
MT-12.description: Manipulating people into revealing information or taking actions

MT-13.title: Supply Chain Attack
MT-13.description: Compromising systems through vulnerabilities in third-party software or hardware

MT-14.title: Physical Intrusion
MT-14.description: Unauthorized physical access to facilities or equipment

MT-15.title: Sabotage
MT-15.description: Deliberate destruction or damage to systems or data
